title: Phase B: Scanner-Level HMM Replacement — Option D (Two-Layer Architecture Locked)
summary: Tier 3 design review for scanner-level HMM replacement. Four options evaluated. Approved Option D: formally document two-layer architecture as intentional and lock it. No code changes.

what_changed.change: Added 2026-05-20 entry: 'Replace Entirely' directive superseded. Documents two-layer separation as intentional architecture: structural gating (scanner VIX-proxy, 6 states, flash-crash intraday) vs. probabilistic weight routing (HMM advisory in _resolve_regime_router). Four rationale points: flash-crash latency, RELIEF_RALLY preservation, label continuity (406 training records), HMM signal-type mismatch. Scanner failure mode wording: handled through stale fallback or UNKNOWN routing, with no-TTL stale cache retained as a future scanner hardening item.

Status updated from DEFERRED to PHASE B COMPLETE. Scanner-level replacement item marked CLOSED — not recommended. Original 'replaces VIX-proxy entirely' text struck through with superseded note. Phase B completion documented: HMM advisory active in weight router, gate met (406/453 eligible), config[regime_detector] stays vix_proxy. Full rationale section added.

decisions_made: The 2026-04-01 'replace VIX-proxy entirely' directive is superseded. Two-layer regime architecture is intentional and locked.
scanner.get_market_regime() remains the structural hard-gating layer (real-time VIX, intraday flash-crash detection, 6 states, hard execution blocks).
HMM role is advisory 3rd vote in _resolve_regime_router() — probabilistic weight routing only, not structural execution gating.

Scanner-level HMM replacement not recommended at this stage. Roadmap item 03-hmm-regime-detection.md closed. Will only reopen if Phase C/D ML analysis specifically implicates VIX-proxy entry_regime labels.

tests.full_suite: Not run — docs-only, no execution path changed

what_is_next: Walk-forward weight calibration — still blocked on HMM (now complete) + Alphalens (pending Amit approval). Roadmap: 06-weight-calibration.md.
Phase C/D (Alphalens full factor analysis, ML engine activation) — awaiting Amit approval.
Tier D Position Research Universe Phase 2 — gate not met, awaiting tier_d_evidence_report.py Section 0b review with Amit.
